name: HEX_PROCESS_DETAILS
description: The table stores the runtime diagnostic, designtime diagnostic, exported extract, generated CSV Template, and other process file.

columns.Name: PROCESS_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates a unique sequence generated value.

columns.Name: PROCESS_CODE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the process code of generic engine.

columns.Name: ESS_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the ess_process_id from the ESS Job.

columns.Name: ENTITY_CODE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the entity code of the generic process.

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the entity value of the generic process.

columns.Name: SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the sequence of the generic process run.

columns.Name: LATEST
columns.Comments: The column indicates the whether the run is latest or not.

columns.Name: PROCESS_OUTPUT
columns.Comments: The column contains the output content of the generic process.

columns.Name: OUTPUT_CHUNK_NUM
columns.Comments: The column indicates the chunk number of the output if chunked.

columns.Name: STORAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the storage type of the output file.

columns.Name: OUTPUT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the output type of the output file.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The column indicates the status of the generic process,

columns.Name: OUTPUT_NAME
columns.Comments: The column indicates the output name of the output file.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
